posts.author: MariaM (Maria)
posts.cookedHtml:
Maria from the monday WorkCanvas team here, I’m excited to share that you can now export your beautifully crafted canvases into professional PDF documents.
This is perfect for sharing your visual work externally — whether for detailed reports, presentations, or print-ready documents.

How it works:

  1. Create Your Canvas: Design your visual masterpiece.

  2. Export Options: Click the export button and select the PDF format.

  3. Choose Your Preference:

  • Export the entire canvas as a single-page PDF.

  • Export by frame, with each frame as a separate page.

  • Bonus: Utilize the “frame by size” feature to ensure your canvas fits specific formats, like A4 for printing.

Enjoy PDF features like encryption, annotations, and digital signatures for added security and customization.

Give it a try, and let us know what you think!

Checkout the knowledge base article here
